ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Proposal Request for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity")) && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Proposal Request") && (TEXT(Bid_Process__c) = "")
